title: CraftShot
description: A Social Network for your Minecraft Screenshots? Yep. Welcome to CraftShot! Just install the Mod, make a screenshot, confirm and its online!
body:
A Social Network for your Minecraft Screenshots?
Yep. Welcome to **CraftShot**!

## How to use?

When making a screenshot you will receive a prompt in the chat asking you if you want to share your freshly made screenshot. If you click upload, it will be sent to our Server and you will see your Browser opening with your freshly made screenshot while getting auto-logged in.

![Screenshot of the confirmation prompt in the chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c298d7d4d794dfd2f3eb9cc87198606ed961d0f6.png)

If you look at the Website that opens in your browser you can click back to the timeline and follow people, like others posts or comment on them but you can also stay on the page and set a caption, write comments, delete the post again. Whatever you like more.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e37e4ce2828d4ea56308a67919874833ab1f045_0.webp)

## Just why..?

Well I looked around and there was no modern way to share screenshots where you could properly find them and interact with them, follow creators etc. Sure, I could post them into some random discords or some very very old minecraft forums. But lets be honest. There could be better solutions. So I tried making one for the community :)

This Project started as a LabyMod Addon first, there it got quite some users but many others wished for a Fabric Mod so that they are not forced on using LabyMod. Thats why I ported it to Fabric as well, maintaining both versions now. 

## Can I contribute?

Yes please! The LabyMod Addon and the Fabric Mod are open source. Feel free to create PRs. The Website is planned to stay closed source for now. If you cant code but still want to help feedback & translations are always welcomed, feel free to join the discord to reach out. :)
